title: Tracing Garbage Collection and Conservative Limits · Pointer Forensics
summary: An incident responder inherits a corrupted small mark-and-sweep collector model, the earliest failing input, and two plausible hypotheses; they must preserve first-failure evidence, repair the cause, and add a regression. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in small mark-and-sweep collector model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define objects, edges, roots, reachability, and collection safety independently from application usefulness.
Mark reachable objects, sweep only unmarked allocations, and reset metadata without losing new or mutated edges.
Explain false retention and invalid reclamation risks when arbitrary words may be treated as pointers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Reachability Roots
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug native-systems team handles memory case 7648. Produce bounded C evidence to mark reachable objects and count only unreachable sweep candidates; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define objects, edges, roots, reachability, and collection safety independently from application usefulness.

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Relate generational and concurrent collection to write barriers, mutator cooperation, pause, throughput, and memory tradeoffs.

hints: For Publish the incident record · Debug Gc Barriers Pauses, name the size, bounds, object, lifetime, owner, borrow, allocation, cleanup, representation, ABI, thread, and transfer boundary, Gc Barriers Pauses precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Publish the incident record · Debug Gc Barriers Pauses, trace this concrete input and predict size arithmetic, pointer range, lifetime transition, allocation result, cleanup order, printed output, and native evidence still missing before reviewing it: A debug native-systems team handles memory case 9174. Produce bounded C evidence to mark reachable objects and count only unreachable sweep candidates; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Relate generational and concurrent collection to write barriers, mutator cooperation, pause, throughput, and memory tradeoffs.

For Publish the incident record · Debug Gc Barriers Pauses, challenge the documented misconception with changed-size, failure-injection, printed invariant, compiler, sanitizer, analyzer, fuzz, ABI, concurrency, or production-transfer evidence: Concurrent collection removes every stop-the-world phase and synchronization cost.
